sentences.text: I want to improve my English.
Regular practice can improve your pronunciation.
The service has improved since last year.

definition: to become or make something larger in amount

sentences.text: We need to increase production.
Prices increased again this month.
Exercise can increase your energy.

definition: to help or encourage someone or something

sentences.text: Good friends support each other.
The evidence supports his argument.
Her family supported her decision.

definition: to examine how two or more things are similar or different

sentences.text: Let us compare the two options.
It is difficult to compare the products.
She compared prices before buying.

definition: to grow, improve, or create something over time

sentences.text: Reading helps you develop new skills.
The company is developing a new product.
Children develop at different speeds.

definition: to take something for a short time and return it later

sentences.text: Can I borrow your pen for a minute?
She borrowed a book from the library.
I borrowed some money from my brother.

definition: to decide which person or thing you want

sentences.text: You need to choose one of these options.
She chose the blue dress.
It is hard to choose between two good offers.

definition: to reach a place at the end of a journey

sentences.text: We will arrive at the station at noon.
The package arrived this morning.
Please call me when you arrive.
Did you notice the change in the room?
I noticed a mistake in the report.
She did not notice the open door.

definition: to ask someone to come to an event or place

sentences.text: I want to invite my friends to dinner.
They invited us to their wedding.
Can I invite a colleague to the meeting?

definition: to keep something in your mind or bring it back to mind

sentences.text: Please remember to call me later.
I remember meeting her years ago.
He could not remember the password.

definition: to make something clear by describing it

sentences.text: Can you explain this rule to me?
She explained how the machine works.
It is difficult to explain the problem briefly.

definition: to like one thing more than another

sentences.text: I prefer tea to coffee.
She prefers working in the morning.
Would you prefer to sit inside?

definition: to make something ready for use or an event

sentences.text: We need to prepare for the meeting.
She prepared dinner for the family.
The team is preparing a presentation.

definition: to get something that someone gives or sends

sentences.text: Did you receive my message?
She received a package yesterday.
You will receive an email confirmation.

definition: to keep doing something without stopping

sentences.text: Please continue reading the next paragraph.
The rain continued all night.
She continued working after dinner.

definition: to keep someone or something safe from harm

sentences.text: This case will protect your phone.
Sunscreen helps protect your skin.
The law protects consumers.

definition: to find an answer to a problem

sentences.text: Can you solve this puzzle?
We need to solve the problem quickly.
The update solved several issues.

definition: to communicate with someone by phone, message, or email

sentences.text: Please contact me if you need help.
The company contacted me about the interview.
Contact customer support by email.
